actions.value:
It sounds like you may have tapped on 'Get Started' instead of 'Sign in', and so a Guest Account was created for you.

 

To logout of this, tap the menu button (≡) in the top right, and then Logout. Tap on Cancel and/or 'Exit Pin' to get back to the main sign-in page.

 

Now, you may enter your username and password to restore your account from an encrypted backup.

 

Please let us know if you have any more questions or concerns.

 

Best regards,

{{current_user.first_name}}

It sounds like you may have tapped on 'Get Started' instead of 'Sign in', and so a Guest Account was created for you.
 
To logout of this, tap the menu button (≡) in the top right, and then Logout. Tap on Cancel and/or 'Exit Pin' to get back to the main sign-in page.
 
Now, you may enter your username and password to restore your account from an encrypted backup.
 
Please let us know if you have any more questions or concerns.
 
Best regards,
{{current_user.first_name}}
